result_note: Integration audit is pre-implementation. Conditions must be satisfied during implementation.

notes: flash_triage.py: cluster_hints is an ADDITIONAL field on TriageResult. Existing fields are preserved. Downstream consumers (investigation_loop._pre_act_planning) that don't read cluster_hints are unaffected.
investigation_loop.py: _pre_act_planning() signature changes from list[TriageResult] to list[TriageResult | ClusterResult]. The ClusterResult type is new; existing TriageResult paths are preserved.
app.py: No signature changes on run_daily() or generate_decision(). Cluster results are injected into investigation loop, not generate_decision.

flow: investigation_loop._pre_act_planning(headlines) → list[str] (accepts ClusterResult, extracts grouped headlines for theme-aware hypothesis generation)

import_boundaries.no_back_imports: Confirmed — entity_extractor and event_clusterer do NOT import from investigation_loop, app, or each other. Imports form a DAG: app → event_clusterer → entity_extractor.

control_flow.status: PASS — no dead loops or unbounded recursion
notes: Tier 1: Single-pass regex extraction, deterministic, no recursion
Tier 2: HDBSCAN fit+label is one call, no iteration
Tier 3: Flash calls bounded by number of clusters (max 50), each call independent
Cross-cluster consolidation: single Flash call, bounded token budget

changes: + TriageResult.cluster_hints: list[str] (new field, default empty list)
+ ClusterResult dataclass (new type, not a modification of existing)
+ _pre_act_planning signature widened from list[TriageResult] to list[TriageResult | ClusterResult]

integration_test_scenarios.name: End-to-end pipeline with clustering wired
steps: 6. Expectation gap, adversarial self-check, deepening run as normal
verification: TriageResult passes through event_clusterer without field loss
ClusterResult correctly typed and consumable by _pre_act_planning

integration_test_scenarios.name: Backward compat — investigation loop with TriageResult only (no clusters)
steps: 1. event_clusterer is disabled or returns empty list
verification: No regression in existing hypothesis generation
Test suite passes unchanged when clustering is disabled

conditions: entity_extractor must not import from event_clusterer or investigation_loop (cross-layer DAG violation)
event_clusterer must not import from investigation_loop (cross-layer DAG violation)
ClusterResult must be importable at investigation_loop.py module level
Run integration tests after wiring: python -m pytest tests/test_integration/test_cluster_integration.py -v
summary: Static analysis: backward compatible (additive fields), clean data flow (6-node pipeline), no import boundary violations, no control flow hazards. Dynamic analysis: two integration test scenarios defined — E2E wired and backward compat (disabled). All active conditions are standard PICA extraction requirements (no back-imports, test-before-integrate).
